reviews.review_title: It really is an incredible game !!!
reviews.review_description: If the devs are seeing this, you really should make your game available on the quest, it would open up a much larger audience, even more so since the quest 2 is coming out !
Not sure it need to be vr  but other wise seems nice zelda esque game.. but I'm not a fan of playing a goblin
love this so much. great control and viewing experience no motion sickness. Enjoys it very much
I have all 3 games & love them. But I'm patiently waiting on more of them.

reviews.review_title: Best game on vr so far
reviews.review_description:
I know I have seen it a lot but I truly think from performance to game play this is the best vr game I have played. Right now I put it up the with my favorites phonecast, groovr, and amaze.

For those looking. Here is the controller I bought for cheap and it works perfect

https://www.walmart.com/ip/747110633

reviews.review_title: One of the, if not the best!
reviews.review_description: Feels like Certain Gameboy-Rpgs, but as VR in good Quality. U can try First steps for free, but this one is much better than First Steps.
By far one of the best vr games I have played. At first I thought the camera angles would be an issue with the vr but I was very wrong, it works perfectly. Great job developers!
I enjoyed it for the first little bit but I kind of got bored.
Fun little puzzle game but some random bugs can prevent you from moving on forcing you to start over.   I ain't no holla back girl.
I love this! Wish there were more games like this.
It feels like zelda but look like moss. nice game! Moving via gampad depends where you actually looking to. this is confusing, because somtimes you will move the character while looking to the enemy.

This is exactly what legend of zelda and alike games used to feel like in the past. I love the challenging geometric puzzles in 3D ! Steady room by room with almost no frustrating situations where you get stuck. Very very enoyable game !

reviews.review_title: Great and I want more dungeons
reviews.review_description: Love this game. Super addicting. Time flying when I play this game! I wish there were more dungeons and maybe harder ones? And maybe a way to pick a specific dungeon instead of it being random once you get more dungeons.

reviews.review_title: I cant believe this is free!!!!
reviews.review_description: Easily one of the best games in vr. This is basically legend of zelda in vr. Great job guys!!!
Best VR game in the bundle. If you like Zelda, this is your game.
Will edit my review once I am able to play, for now, a 1 star since I cannot even try it yet...

Remember those awesome cartoony games on PS1 like Spyro and Croc? Now picture yourself dropped into the middle of one of those games. YES!!! This game is awesome! PLEASE do yourself a favor and try it, and PLEASE tell me there will be more of these (and similar) games! Love it!!! <3
This was the best VR game i played, i hope you make more games like this or do something new that can really bring VR to what it should be.
Feels like a full game not just an experience like everything else we have on the gear vr ive already played 4 hours and havent even scratched the surface very similar to zelda but in 3rd person vr
Game was free and worth it. Old skool!
